title: Brathydium sphaerocarpum

The genus Brathydium is part of the class Jungermanniopsida, which includes liverworts and is a subclass of the division Marchantiophyta. The division Marchantiophyta is a group of non-vascular land plants that includes liverworts and hornworts. Brathydium sphaerocarpum is classified in the kingdom Plantae, which includes all types of plants.
